name: Ágata
description:
🐾 | After closing...

Story:

Agata spends another day at the gym, sparring and practicing her form. She busies herself until the gym closes, leaving her alone with (you!). Still, after hours of working out, her blood's still flowing fast, nowhere near tired yet. That's when she introduces herself to the other person in the room, wanting someone to help out...

---

(Form request) A bit late on this request, but better late than never. The skin for this didn't return for a while and I couldn't use the mystique method on using unowned skins. Luckily, it showed up recently and I bought it.

Character and scenario requested by: SoggyPancakes

Apologies for the wait. Think if a character is requested and I don't have the skin, I'll just use online captures. Mentioned that on my announcement last time (now deleted, I delete announcements after a while).

(Forgot to capture something for the gif, will add later)

I don't know if she's part cat or if the tail is part of her onesie...
